heading: Senate privately paid travel public website
label: 4727 Senate privately paid travel public website
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 104g of this title

children.text: uniform categorization by Member, dates of travel, and any other common categories associated with congressional travel; and
forms filed in the Senate relating to officially related travel.

children.heading: Retention
children.label: b Retention
children.text: The Secretary of the Senate shall maintain the information posted on the public Internet site of the Office of the Secretary under this section for a period not longer than 4 years after receiving the information.

children.heading: Extension of authority
children.label: c Extension of authority
children.text: If the Secretary of the Senate is unable to meet the deadline established under subsection (a), the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate may grant an extension of the Secretary of the Senate.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations1So in original. No subsec. (d) has been enacted.1
children.label: e Authorization of appropriations1So in original. No subsec. (d) has been enacted.1
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out this section.
